requests.prompt: Full-frame start image, physical scene fills the canvas edge to edge—no inner frame, borders, insets, or margins. Use reference image 1 as the real product identity lock; keep the Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat exactly as in ref (oatmeal beige color, silk-cotton, shape, labels, stitching/marks). Place that same coat neatly on a wooden hanger, centered on a simple matte-black clothing rack in a modern apartment entryway. Left: slim light-wood bench against a warm neutral wall. Right: closed light-wood front door. Floor: matte light wood. Soft natural morning light from an off-camera window, gentle warm, even illumination. Minimal, tidy scene; no person or hand. Product clearly visible at plausible scale and orientation. Not a packshot. No text, UI, posters, watermarks, or extra logos.
requests.negative_prompt: No captions, subtitles, watermark, UI, fake logo, random letters, extra fingers, warped hands, blurry product, wrong product, product-only packshot, empty background, inner frame, border, poster, inset image, image inside an image, black margins, dark outer margins, central vertical rectangle, photo within a photo, matted print.
